text: What if we could rewrite the code of life? CRISPR prime editing is a revolutionary method that allows scientists to make precise changes in DNA. Unlike earlier CRISPR techniques, it can insert or delete genetic material without unintended side effects. Preliminary studies show it could potentially treat genetic disorders like sickle cell disease. But remember, this research is still in its early stages and needs more validation. Curious about how this technology could change our future? Like and follow for more updates!
